photoURL.description: The URL of the user's profile picture.

FractionalizedNft.title: Fractionalized NFT
FractionalizedNft.description: Represents an NFT that has been fractionalized.

userId.description: The ID of the user who fractionalized the NFT.

nftContract.description: The contract address of the NFT.

tokenId.description: The token ID of the NFT.

shareAmount.description: The number of shares the NFT was fractionalized into.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the NFT was fractionalized.

AiNft.title: AI NFT
AiNft.description: Represents an AI-generated image that has been fractionalized.

userId.description: The ID of the user who created the art.

prompt.description: The text prompt used to generate the image.

imageUrl.description: The data URI of the generated image.

tokenId.description: The new token ID for the fractionalized shares.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the art was fractionalized.

RealWorldAsset.title: Real-World Asset
RealWorldAsset.description: Represents a real-world asset that has been fractionalized.

userId.description: The ID of the user who owns the asset.

description.description: A description of the asset (e.g., address, car model, jewelry type).

ownershipProofUrl.description: URL to the uploaded proof of ownership document in Firebase Storage.

identityUrl.description: URL to the uploaded identity document in Firebase Storage.

tokenId.description: The new token ID for the fractionalized shares.

createdAt.description: The timestamp when the asset was fractionalized.

WalletConnection.title: Wallet Connection
WalletConnection.description: Logs an individual wallet connection event.

userId.description: The ID of the authenticated user, if available.

WalletActivity.title: Wallet Activity
WalletActivity.description: Aggregates connection activity for a single wallet address.

connectionCount.description: Total number of connections from this wallet.

lastConnectionAt.description: The timestamp of the last connection.

flagged.description: True if the wallet has been flagged for suspicious activity.

/users/{userId}.description: Stores public information about a user.

/fractionalizedNfts/{nftId}.description: Stores information about fractionalized NFTs from a wallet.

/aiNfts/{aiNftId}.description: Stores information about fractionalized AI-generated art.

/realWorldAssets/{assetId}.description: Stores information about fractionalized real-world assets.

/walletConnections/{connectionId}.description: Logs each time a wallet connects to the app.

/walletActivity/{walletAddress}.description: Tracks connection counts and flags for each wallet address.
